text: As I stand in this bright, structured hallway, a sense of anticipation stirs within me. The glass before me reveals an exhibit, its bold R+D text signaling a space devoted to inquiry and progress. There is a quiet, formal order here, softened by the promise of creative thought. Moving closer, the vibrant wall draws me in, offering reflections on human experience—mundane and profound. I feel a calm curiosity waking, the urge to contemplate not only what these displayed words and objects mean but how I, too, relate to this ongoing conversation between humanity and innovation. The space feels like an invitation to pause, observe, and think deeply about our place in a world of constant change.
